thread.title: Tulsa police investigate domestic-related shooting at Mohawk Manor
thread.title_full: Tulsa police investigate domestic-related shooting at Mohawk Manor

author: DeAngelo Marquise Vaxter
title: Tulsa police investigate domestic-related shooting at Mohawk Manor
text: {p}{ }Flag for usage of AI Transcript Assistant{/p}{p}The Tulsa Police Department (TPD) is investigating a Thursday night shooting.{/p}{p}Gilcrease Division officers responded to the shooting around 7:45 pm at Mohawk Manor.{/p}{p}Upon arrival, officers found a victim in his car in the parking lot with a gunshot wound to his abdomen.{/p}{ul}{li}{strong}SEE ALSO: {/strong}{a href=\"https://ktul.com/news/local/full-autopsy-report-on-veronica-butlers-death-lists-30-stab-and-cut-wounds-texas-county-oklahoma-panhandle-murders-homicide-kansas-women-sharp-force-trauma-knife-stun-gun-tape-freezer-buried-arrests-medical-examiners-report#\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://ktul.com/news/local/full-autopsy-report-on-veronica-butlers-death-lists-30-stab-and-cut-wounds-texas-county-oklahoma-panhandle-murders-homicide-kansas-women-sharp-force-trauma-knife-stun-gun-tape-freezer-buried-arrests-medical-examiners-report#\"}Full autopsy report on Veronica Butler's death lists 30 stab and cut wounds{/a}{/li}{/ul}{p}After interviewing witnesses and considering statements made by the victim to medical personnel, authorities determined the shooting was domestic. {/p}{p}According to TPD, the suspect was arrested and taken to the David L. Moss Criminal Justice Center. {/p}{p}Police said the victim was taken to St. John's Medical Center in stable condition.{/p}{p}{a href=\"https://ktul.com/sign-up\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://ktul.com/sign-up\"}SIGN UP FOR THE CHANNEL 8 NEWSLETTER{/a}{/p}{p}FRIDAY: Mostly sunny, with highs in the mid 50s. Winds are light and out of the northeast.{/p}{p}SATURDAY: Partly cloudy and warmer. Highs will be in the mid 60s, with a southeasterly wind at 10-15 mph.{/p}{p}Gusty winds return Sunday, boosting temperatures to the low to mid 70s. Another dry cold front arrives Monday, dropping our highs to the mid 50s. We're still watching a system that is set to arrive by the middle of the holiday week. Rain chances will return to the forecast sometime near and around Thanksgiving, but nothing terribly impactful looks likely at this time. We will keep watching.{/p}{p}Available {a href=\"https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ktul-wx/id489182496\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ktul-wx/id489182496\"}HERE{/a} for iOS
